title: Voter turnout expected to touch record highs in Phulparas
snippet_text: Electoral awareness campaigns and intense political mobilization by party workers point to a high turnout of youth and women voters in Phulparas constituency.

title: Bihar Elections 2025: Key issues dominate debates in Phulparas
snippet_text: As the election campaign intensifies, voters in Phulparas assembly constituency raise questions about infrastructure development, road connectivity, and agricultural support schemes.

title: Political rally in Phulparas draws massive crowds ahead of voting day
snippet_text: Top party leaders addressed a massive rally in Phulparas promising job creations, free electricity, and specialized sub-plans for rural developmental bounds.

title: Welfare scheme execution becomes election issue in Phulparas
snippet_text: Local reports indicate that MGNREGA work allocations and PMAY home delivery rates are taking center stage in public debates across Phulparas assembly segment.
